title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU · Packet Lens: Net Speed Duplex
summary: Segment a campus switch fabric for staff, voice, guest, management, and redundant uplinks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net speed duplex increment in a verified switched campus configuration plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Negotiate or configure compatible speed and duplex and diagnose mismatch through counters and link behavior.
Bundle compatible links with a shared aggregation protocol and verify member, hashing, capacity, and failure behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Build Net Speed Duplex evidence
steps.instruction: Append a safe investigation headed "# Evidence: net-speed-duplex-kwam24" with a concrete hypothesis, one read-only network command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Net Speed Duplex into observable performance evidence.

steps.title: Defend the Net Speed Duplex model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Net Speed Duplex applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Negotiate or configure compatible speed and duplex and diagnose mismatch through counters and link behavior.
